package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerGarbageCollectionCleanupResponseBodyNotDrainedForReuse() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_response_body_not_drained_for_reuse"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag HTTP response handling that closes bodies without draining when connection reuse matters."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
